{{CargoClone
|name=Perseus
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=199
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Water DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=All Realm Spirit HARD Stats +0.6%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=All Realm Spirit HARD Stats +1%
|}}
